 {"id":"bd-7of4","title":"Implement drill-down view for detailed question context","description":"Drill-down view shows full context for a single question.

Layout:
+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| project-alpha - Session Detail                           [ESC] |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| Repository: https://github.com/owner/project-alpha             |
| Session ID: ru-review-project-alpha                            |
| Duration: 12m 34s | Context: 45%                               |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| ISSUE #42: Authentication failing on Windows                   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| Reported by: @user123 on 2024-12-15 (20 days ago)             |
| Description: When I try to login on Windows 11...              |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| CLAUDE ANALYSIS                                                |
| I verified this issue. Root cause in auth.py:234:              |
|   config_path = home_dir + "/config/auth.json"                 |
| Options:                                                        |
|   A: Minimal fix (5 lines, low risk)                           |
|   B: Full refactor (45 lines, medium risk)                     |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| [a] Quick fix  [b] Full refactor  [c] Skip  [v] View session   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+

open_drilldown() renders full view, handles a/b/c quick answers, v shows raw session output, Esc returns to dashboard.

show_patch_summary() displays changed files, diff stats, test status.

 {"id":"bd-7v3i","title":"Implement global rate limit backoff","description":"# Global Rate Limit Backoff

## Parent Epic: bd-kvu5 (Error Handling & Recovery)

## Purpose
Coordinate pause across all parallel workers when rate limited.

## Implementation

```bash
BACKOFF_STATE_FILE="${AGENT_SWEEP_STATE_DIR}/backoff.state"
BACKOFF_LOCK="${AGENT_SWEEP_STATE_DIR}/locks/backoff.lock"

agent_sweep_backoff_trigger() {
    local reason="$1"
    local current_delay="${2:-30}"
    local max_delay=600  # 10 minutes cap
    
    if dir_lock_acquire "$BACKOFF_LOCK" 10; then
        local now pause_until new_delay
        
        # Read current state
        if [[ -f "$BACKOFF_STATE_FILE" ]]; then
            local current_pause
            current_pause=$(json_get_field "$(cat "$BACKOFF_STATE_FILE")" "pause_until" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
            now=$(date +%s)
            if [[ "$current_pause" -gt "$now" ]]; then
                # Already paused, extend with exponential backoff
                new_delay=$((current_delay * 2))
                [[ "$new_delay" -gt "$max_delay" ]] && new_delay=$max_delay
            else
                new_delay=$current_delay
            fi
        else
            new_delay=$current_delay
        fi
        
        # Add jitter (±25%)
        local jitter=$(( (RANDOM % (new_delay / 2)) - (new_delay / 4) ))
        new_delay=$((new_delay + jitter))
        
        pause_until=$(($(date +%s) + new_delay))
        
        # Write state
        echo "{\"reason\":\"$reason\",\"pause_until\":$pause_until}" > "$BACKOFF_STATE_FILE"
        
        log_warn "Rate limit detected ($reason), global pause for ${new_delay}s"
        dir_lock_release "$BACKOFF_LOCK"
    fi
}

agent_sweep_backoff_wait_if_needed() {
    if [[ \! -f "$BACKOFF_STATE_FILE" ]]; then
        return 0
    fi
    
    local pause_until now
    pause_until=$(json_get_field "$(cat "$BACKOFF_STATE_FILE")" "pause_until" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    now=$(date +%s)
    
    if [[ "$pause_until" -gt "$now" ]]; then
        local wait_secs=$((pause_until - now))
        log_warn "Global backoff active, waiting ${wait_secs}s..."
        sleep "$wait_secs"
    fi
}
```

## Rate Limit Detection

Check ntm activity for rate_limited flag:
```bash
if ntm_get_activity "$session" | grep -q "\"rate_limited\":true"; then
    agent_sweep_backoff_trigger "rate_limited"
fi
```

## Exponential Backoff
- Initial delay: 30 seconds
- Doubles on each trigger
- Max delay: 10 minutes
- Jitter: ±25% to prevent thundering herd","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-06T21:55:20.428995006Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-07T00:57:49.503154003Z","closed_at":"2026-01-07T00:57:49.503154003Z","close_reason":"Implemented agent_sweep_backoff_trigger(), agent_sweep_backoff_wait_if_needed(), agent_sweep_backoff_clear(), and agent_sweep_backoff_active() with exponential backoff (x2), jitter (±25%), 10-minute cap, atomic state file, and lock handling. Integration into workflow functions will happen when those are implemented.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-7v3i","depends_on_id":"bd-6kme","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-06T21:59:03.703326272Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}
